messages.text: We're open Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST, but I'm available 24/7 to help you.
I don't have any information about plans, could you please specify what you're referring to so I can better assist you?
I'm so sorry to hear that, can you tell me a bit more about what's causing your frustration so I can try to help?
Could you help me with my tracking number?
I'd be happy to help, but I don't have any information about tracking numbers, let me see if I can assist you with something else, like returns maybe?
My tracking number. My tracking number is order o r d. 1 2 3 4 5.
Let me look up your order with the number "ord 12345" right away.
Give me tracking info on o. R d, 1 2 3 4 5.
I've got your order, let me just check the status of "ord 12345" for you.
